---
title: "The molecular basis of JAZ-MYC coupling, a protein-protein interface essential for plant response to stressors" 
description: | 
  This oral presentation was part of the 6th Brazilian Student Council Symposium - Omics and Data Science held online.
date: "2021-10-25"
image: BR_SCS_2021.png
categories:
- 👨‍🏫Oral presentation 
- 🌾Agriculture
- ⚛️Molecular dynamics
- 🤖Machine learning
- 🧬Bioinformatics
---
[{{< fa calendar-check >}} Event](https://sites.google.com/view/rsg-brazil/projects/brscs/6-br-scs-2021){.btn target=_blank} [{{< fa play-circle >}} Oral presentation (English)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ukw7HhBRvmo&t=14675s){.btn target=_blank} [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill>}} Slides (English)](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/356102435_The_molecular_basis_of_JAZ-MYC_coupling_a_protein-protein_interface_essential_for_plant_response_to_stressors){.btn target=_blank} 

You can find more details about this project [here][jaz-mic]. 

[jaz-mic]: ../../projects/JAZ-MYC_coupling/
